name: Bella
description: Bella is a friendly and playful Golden Retriever who loves cuddles, long walks, and playing fetch. She is great with kids and other pets. She is house-trained and very well-behaved.

name: Oliver
description: Oliver is a calm and affectionate Persian cat. He enjoys lounging in sunny spots and being gently petted. Ideal for apartment living. Gets along well with other cats.

name: Max
description: Max is a trained German Shepherd with basic obedience commands. He is loyal, intelligent, and protective. Perfect for families who want a reliable guard dog as well as a loving companion.

name: Luna
description: Luna needs a new home due to her owner relocating abroad. She is a curious and vocal Siamese cat who loves playing with toys and interactive games. Very affectionate once she trusts you.

name: Rocky
description: Rocky is an energetic and loving Labrador who is still in his puppy phase. He loves swimming, playing ball, and making new friends. Needs an active family who can give him plenty of exercise.

name: Milo
description: Milo is an adorable Holland Lop rabbit with floppy ears and a gentle temperament. He is litter-trained and loves fresh vegetables. Perfect for first-time pet owners or families with older children.

name: Daisy
description: Daisy is a sweet and gentle Beagle who loves sniffing around the garden and following her nose on walks. She is sociable with other dogs and excellent with children. Fully house-trained.

name: Simba
description: Simba is a majestic Maine Coon with a thick, fluffy coat and a dog-like personality. He loves following his owner around and is very playful. Comes with all vaccinations and health certificates.

name: Tweety
description: Tweety is a cheerful budgerigar who can already mimic a few words! She loves music and will chirp along to songs. Comes with her cage and feeding accessories. Great for beginners.

name: Coco
description: Coco is a well-groomed standard Poodle who needs a new loving home. She is highly intelligent, hypoallergenic, and knows over 20 commands. Needs an attentive owner who enjoys training.

name: Nemo
description: Nemo is a beautiful Clownfish perfect for a saltwater aquarium. Comes with a 20-gallon tank, filter, and all required accessories. A peaceful addition to any marine tank.

name: Brownie
description: Brownie is a loveable Dachshund with a big personality. He loves belly rubs, napping on the couch, and short walks. Great for apartment living. Very loyal to his owner.
